mapper.select: SELECT * FROM heritage_image WHERE heritage_id = #{heritageId} ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO heritage_image (heritage_id, image_url, sort, create_time) VALUES (#{heritageId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sort}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE heritage_image SET heritage_id = #{heritageId}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, sort = #{sort} WHERE id = #{id}
